response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development skills, but lacks the mandatory C++ experience on Windows and fixed-income/capital-markets domain expertise required for this role. Their background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems, with limited alignment to the core technical and domain requirements.
strengths: Diverse technical background with experience in multiple languages and frameworks, showcasing adaptability.
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, indicating passion for software craftsmanship.
Proven leadership in workshops and talks, demonstrating excellent communication skills.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of C++ development experience on Windows, with only brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments.
No evident experience in fixed-income, capital markets, or investment banking domains.
Primary expertise lies in web/mobile development (JavaScript/TypeScript), which is not relevant to this role.
